ddls:
CREATE TABLE "changes" (
  "change_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each change */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date the change was made */,
  "author_id" INTEGER /* ID of the author who made the change */,
  "log" TEXT /* Brief description of the change (log) */,
  "options" TEXT /* Options for downloading files (e.g., [files] [tgz] [zip]) */,
  "version_number" TEXT /* Version number of the software or documentation */,
  "exposure_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the exposure type */,
  "file_type" TEXT /* Type of the file (e.g., text, image, compressed) */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* Path to the file */,
  "change_status_id" INTEGER /* ID of the change status */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("change_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_changes_exposure_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("exposure_type_id") REFERENCES exposure_types ("exposure_type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_changes_change_status_id FOREIGN KEY ("change_status_id") REFERENCES change_statuses ("status_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_changes_author_id FOREIGN KEY ("author_id") REFERENCES authors ("author_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "authors" (
  "author_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each author */,
  "author_name" TEXT /* Full name of the author */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the author */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department of the author */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the author in the company */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the author */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("author_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "exposures" (
  "exposure_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each exposure */,
  "change_id" INTEGER /* ID of the change that affected the exposure */,
  "exposure_name" TEXT /* Name of the software or documentation (exposure) */,
  "exposure_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the exposure type */,
  "version_number" TEXT /* Version number of the exposure */,
  "file_type" TEXT /* Type of the file (e.g., text, image, compressed) */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* Path to the file */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("exposure_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_exposures_change_id FOREIGN KEY ("change_id") REFERENCES changes ("change_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_exposures_exposure_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("exposure_type_id") REFERENCES exposure_types ("exposure_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "files" (
  "file_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each file */,
  "file_name" TEXT /* Name of the file */,
  "file_type" TEXT /* Type of the file (e.g., text, image, compressed) */,
  "file_size" INTEGER /* Size of the file */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* Path to the file */,
  "change_id" INTEGER /* ID of the change associated with the file */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("file_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_files_change_id FOREIGN KEY ("change_id") REFERENCES changes ("change_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "change_statuses" (
  "status_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each status */,
  "status_name" TEXT /* Name of the status (e.g., pending, approved, rejected) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("status_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "exposure_types" (
  "exposure_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each exposure type */,
  "exposure_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the exposure type (e.g., software, documentation) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("exposure_type_id")
)
